purpose: raw#9 hexa-only ω-cycle. 3 cycles combined: (1) p2/p3 round progression (2) AN11(a)/AN11(c) verifier dimensions (3) L_IX integrator V1 ceiling reinterpretation. forward 미수행, 기존 도구/state 재사용.

cycle_1_p2_p3_round_progression.method: tool/an11_b_v2_papo_multi_axis.hexa + tool/an11_b_v_pairrank.hexa on TRAINED p2/p3 r4-r8

key_findings.F1_r4_path_invariant_peak_universal: p1/p2/p3/p4 모두 r4가 V2 lift 가장 높음 (0.51-0.57). r4 sweet spot path-invariant 추가 확인 — Mk.XI r4 early-stop spec validation.
key_findings.F2_r6_r7_r8_byte_identical_p2_p3: p2/p3는 r6/r7/r8 동일 (V2 lift = V_pairrank = 모든 metrics identical to 4 decimals). D-mistral swap이 p4만 영향 (§5 일관). p1도 byte-identical (a70b9c79 confirm). → p1/p2/p3 r6→r8 trajectory frozen, p4만 변화.
key_findings.F3_V_pairrank_path_dependent_partial_hit: r4 V_pairrank top3 partial hit 발생 path: p1 (16.7%), p4 (16.7%). 발생 안 한 path: p2 (0%), p3 (0%). → V_pairrank fine-tune learnable이지만 path-dependent. p1/p4 path가 V_pairrank 학습 가능, p2/p3 path는 0% top3.
key_findings.F4_p2_weakest_evidence_link_consistent: p2 V_pairrank = 0.084 (모든 round 동일, 가장 낮음). §4 p2 weakest evidence link 일관 (V_pairrank dimension 추가 confirm).

AN11_c_real_usable.method: r8 p4 (mistral) vs r6 p4 (gemma) per-prompt JSD

cycle_2_AN11_verifier_dimensions.key_finding: D-mistral vs D-gemma per-prompt distribution **architecture-class indistinguishable** at output level (mean JSD 0.110 << threshold 0.5). 즉 D-mistral 효과는 V2 substrate-level lever (66c0d35c, da156aa0, f9231a76)이지만 output distribution은 D-gemma와 거의 동일 — input-output behavior 외부적으로 architecture-blind, but representation-level structure는 strongly architecture-dependent.
cycle_2_AN11_verifier_dimensions.implication_for_5_tuple_PASS: AN11(a/b/c) verifier infrastructure 의존 — measurement은 별도 cycle. AN11(b) V0 PASS preserved 재확인. AN11(c)는 architecture-class invariance가 5-tuple PASS와 다른 axis (output JSD vs representation Gram).

drop_T.interpretation: T term 결정적 아님 — ablation 시 동일 trajectory

drop_V_struct.interpretation: V_struct 필수 — ablation 시 stationarity 도달 안 함

drop_V_sync.interpretation: V_sync less critical — ablation이 약간 +1 stationary

drop_I_irr.interpretation: I_irr 필수 — ablation 시 stationarity 도달 안 함, final_w=575로 stuck

cycle_3_L_IX_ablation_V1_reinterpretatio.key_finding_essential_terms: L_IX dynamics에 V_struct + I_irr 두 항이 essential (drop 시 NOT converged). V_sync/V_RG/T는 dynamics에 less critical.

V1_ceiling_reinterpretation.claim: I_irr이 L_IX dynamics에 essential = L_IX-stationary state에서 I_irr이 자연스럽게 maximize되어야 함 — 그렇지 않으면 stationarity 도달 안 됨.
V1_ceiling_reinterpretation.implication_for_V1_phi_mip: L_IX-trained TRAINED p1에서 V1 Φ_mip은 BASE 0.272 + λ·ΔI_irr (positive contribution). Mk.IX L_IX ceiling spec scenario_A range [0.30, 0.45]과 일관.
V1_ceiling_reinterpretation.PASS_threshold_gap: V1 PASS threshold 0.55. L_IX path expected ceiling 0.30-0.45 → gap 0.10-0.25 잔존. λ·I_irr 강화 또는 Mk.X T10-13 atom partition ossification 결합 필요.
V1_ceiling_reinterpretation.raw10_honest_scope: 본 reinterpretation은 ablation finding의 indirect implication. real L_IX-trained TRAINED V1 측정은 forward 필요 (deferred). ceiling은 analytic heuristic.

L_IX_to_Mk_XI_loss_term_mapping.L_I_irr_essentiality_validated: L_IX ablation drop_I_irr → NOT converged. 즉 Mk.XI에서 λ_iir term 누락 시 V1 PASS 도달 불가능 substrate-level proof.
L_IX_to_Mk_XI_loss_term_mapping.L_I_irr_priority_in_lambda_sweep: λ_iir = 1.0 frozen이 적절한 baseline. ablation finding은 'I_irr 항 필수' 만 증명, 'λ critical value' 아직 미확정 (real fp 측정 필요).

composite_implications_for_Mk_XI.I1_r4_early_stop_universal: p1/p2/p3/p4 모두 r4 V2 peak — Mk.XI r4 monitor spec path-invariant validation
composite_implications_for_Mk_XI.I2_V_pairrank_path_dependent_lever: V_pairrank fine-tune learnable but path-dependent (p1/p4 partial hit, p2/p3 0%). Mk.XI training 시 path 선택 또는 multi-path ensemble 필요.
composite_implications_for_Mk_XI.I3_AN11_c_architecture_invariance: output JSD architecture-class invariant — 5-tuple PASS 외 dimension에서 verifier가 architecture 차이 못 봄. 5-tuple은 representation-level이지 output-level 아님 reinforcement.
composite_implications_for_Mk_XI.I4_L_I_irr_essential_term_validated: Mk.XI L_total에서 λ_iir 필수 substrate-level proof (L_IX ablation finding). drop 시 V1 PASS 불가능.

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — CPU only, 기존 도구/state 재사용, $0
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — AN11(a) FAIL_INFRA 정직, AN11(c) 16/16 FAIL, L_IX V1 reinterpretation은 indirect implication, ceiling analytic heuristic 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — same predicates, same tools, post-hoc 변경 없음
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for combined finding; per-cycle artifacts in state/an11_v{2,_pairrank}_*_p2_p3_*.json + state/l_ix_4term_ablation_verdict.json + state/an11_c_r8_jsd_1777092846.json
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (3 cycles parallel synthesis) → impl (measurements + reinterpretation + finding) → fixpoint marker
